person wearing a black long-sleeved top and black shorts

atomic_facts.fact: A person in a red top stands on the grass field.
A person in a black top stands to the left of the person in red.
A group of people stands to the right of the person in red.
A person in a yellow jacket sits in a white chair on the far right.
A red flag with 'Athletics' text stands vertically on the right.
A sign reading 'OLYMPIC PARK STADIUM MELBOURNE' is visible on the stadium structure.

spatial: The person in the red top is in the center of the grass field, with an orange cone near their feet. To the left of the person in red is a person in a black top. To the right of the person in red are three other people standing and one person sitting in a chair. The red flag is to the right of the group of people. The large stadium structure is in the background, behind all the people on the field.
state_changes: Multiple people standing on grass field; person in yellow jacket sitting.

visible_entities.desc: person with short blonde hair, wearing a white long-sleeved hoodie, black shorts, and yellow sneakers
person with short brown hair, wearing a dark blue long-sleeved top and black pants
person with short brown hair, wearing an orange sleeveless top and black shorts
group of three people standing together, one in a blue shirt, one in a dark jacket

red running track
orange cone
empty stadium bleachers with metal railings
red vertical banner with white text

atomic_facts.fact: A person in a white hoodie walks across the grass field from left to right.
Several people are standing on the red running track in the background.
An orange cone sits on the track near the center of the frame.
The stadium bleachers in the background are mostly empty.

spatial: The person in the white hoodie is in the foreground, walking to the right of the frame. Behind them, on the red running track, stands a person in an orange top who is to the right of a person in a dark blue top. The orange cone is on the track, positioned between the person in the dark blue top and the person in the orange top. The empty bleachers are in the background, behind all the people on the track.
state_changes: Person in white hoodie walks right; group of three people standing together.

visible_entities.desc: stylized logo featuring a blue letter 'V' intertwined with a red and orange crescent shape
white text block listing production credits
yellow text reading 'copyright Athletics Victoria 2010'

atomic_facts.fact: The video displays a static credit screen with a black background.
The text 'Race Callers: Paul Jenes OAM Tom Nickson' is visible.
The text 'Narration: Tom Nickson' is visible.
The text 'Production: David Armstrong' is visible.
The copyright text 'copyright Athletics Victoria 2010' is displayed at the bottom.

spatial: The stylized logo is positioned on the left side of the screen. The block of white text listing the credits is to the right of the logo. The yellow copyright text is located at the bottom center of the screen, below both the logo and the credits.
state_changes: Transition to end credits: logo and text blocks appear.

visible_entities.desc: A stylized logo featuring a large blue letter 'V' with a red and orange gradient sphere on the left and a blue, orange, and yellow flame-like shape on the right, accompanied by blue stars.
White text on a black background listing credits.
Yellow text reading 'copyright Athletics Victoria 2010'.

atomic_facts.fact: The screen displays a static credits slide.
The text lists Paul Jenes OAM and Tom Nickson as Race Callers.
The text lists Tom Nickson for Narration.
The text lists David Armstrong for Production.
The copyright notice at the bottom reads 'copyright Athletics Victoria 2010'.

spatial: The logo is positioned on the left side of the screen, while the white credit text is aligned to the right. The yellow copyright text is centered at the bottom of the frame, below both the logo and the credit list.

visible_entities.desc: Blue square graphic containing a stylized 'V' logo with orange and yellow swooshes and blue stars, with text 'Athletics Victoria' below it.
White text credits listing names under categories 'Race Callers', 'Narration', and 'Production'.
Yellow text reading 'copyright Athletics Victoria 2010'.

atomic_facts.fact: The screen displays a static credits sequence.
The text 'Race Callers' lists Paul Jenes OAM and Tom Nickson.
The text 'Narration' lists Tom Nickson.
The text 'Production' lists David Armstrong.
The copyright notice 'copyright Athletics Victoria 2010' is visible at the bottom.

spatial: The blue square graphic with the Athletics Victoria logo is positioned on the left side of the screen. The white text listing the race callers, narration, and production credits is located to the right of the blue graphic. The yellow copyright text is centered at the bottom of the screen, below both the graphic and the white text.
